title: Evaluating Farmers' Pearl Millet Cultivars: Results from a Workshop on Farmer Participation in Breeding and Conservation of Genetic Resources
abstract: The objectives of the workshop were to describe the effects of farmers' own seed management practices on pearl millet [Pennisetum glaucum (L) R. Br.] populations and to identify possible implications for breeding and conservation  of genetic diversity  in this crop.   Farmer cultivars were compared with selected improved varieties that had similar characters or were being used in the region.
